nodes.label: Buyer cookie authentication gate
nodes.rationale: Wishlist routes require BUYER_COOKIE_NAME token; unauthenticated GET returns empty items, mutating routes return 401.

nodes.label: Section type key must match Proxima admin
nodes.rationale: SECTION_MAP keys must exactly match SectionType keys in Proxima admin or proxima.template.json; mismatch breaks deploy and Builder rendering.
nodes.norm_label: section type key must match proxima admin

nodes.label: CLI command aliases deploy and template shortcuts
nodes.norm_label: cli command aliases deploy and template shortcuts

nodes.label: Monorepo storefront discovery via proxima.website.json
nodes.rationale: CLI scans apps/, templates/, sites/ for proxima.website.json to enumerate storefront workspaces and resolve slug/path targets.

nodes.label: CMS Preview Mode
nodes.rationale: Activated by cms_preview=1 query param; switches robots to noindex,nofollow and enables tenant override for Builder visual editing without affecting live SEO.

nodes.label: Builder Inspect Chrome
nodes.rationale: DOM data-cms-* attributes on editable sections and attributes let the visual Builder postMessage bridge identify and label CMS fields for in-context editing.

nodes.label: Fixture vs Live Data Routing
nodes.rationale: Storefront apps inject per-website JSON fixtures for local dev while production uses live API; SDK centralizes the mode switch so Astro.locals.catalogSource stays thin.

nodes.label: Changeset: bundled agent skills for CLI
nodes.norm_label: changeset: bundled agent skills for cli

nodes.norm_label: opsx apply — implement openspec change tasks

nodes.label: OPSX Archive — archive completed OpenSpec change
nodes.norm_label: opsx archive — archive completed openspec change

nodes.label: OPSX Explore — thinking mode without implementation
nodes.norm_label: opsx explore — thinking mode without implementation

nodes.label: OPSX Propose — create OpenSpec change artifacts
nodes.norm_label: opsx propose — create openspec change artifacts

nodes.label: Section type triple-sync pattern
nodes.rationale: A Proxima section must stay synchronized across proxima.website.json, the Astro component, and SectionRenderer registry or it will not render correctly.

nodes.label: delta spec sync to main specs
nodes.norm_label: delta spec sync to main specs

nodes.label: Explore mode no code implementation rule
nodes.norm_label: explore mode no code implementation rule

nodes.label: pnpm build test typecheck CI steps
nodes.norm_label: pnpm build test typecheck ci steps

nodes.label: Three layers: manifest runtime CMS catalog
nodes.norm_label: three layers: manifest runtime cms catalog

nodes.label: Deploy syncs schemas not merchant content
nodes.norm_label: deploy syncs schemas not merchant content

nodes.label: Locale resolution chain
nodes.rationale: Composition API resolves localized values in order: requested locale, business default locale, then first available value; non-localizable attrs use underscore wrapper shortcut.

nodes.label: process* server helper pattern
nodes.rationale: Astro API routes stay thin by importing process* helpers from storefront-core that resolve website internally and delegate to SDK fetch functions.

nodes.label: file: relative dependency linking
nodes.rationale: Consumer repos link to SDK packages via file:../proxima-storefront-sdk/packages/* during local development instead of npm publish or npm link.

nodes.label: storefront-cms PoC and 214store consolidation
nodes.rationale: storefront-cms uses the proxima-214store version as base because it is a superset with createStorefrontApiClient, resolveCmsTenantFromUrl, getShellSectionMap, and mergeProductItemOverrides.

nodes.label: Proxima Storefront SDK Monorepo Proposal
nodes.rationale: Centralize duplicated SDK and CLI code from proxima-managed-storefront-poc and proxima-website-template-catalog into a versioned monorepo so multiple storefronts share one source of truth.

nodes.label: proxima.template.json
nodes.rationale: Marketplace template manifest with template_key, slug, renderer, and publication fields for register/publish flow.

nodes.label: Composition-First Architecture
nodes.rationale: Page data including PDP, CLP, and BLP arrives via fetchProximaComposition resolved_data; SDK only needs out-of-page catalog and cart calls.

nodes.label: Customer Auth and Profile SDK Proposal
nodes.norm_label: customer auth and profile sdk proposal

nodes.label: Single-File SDK Pattern
nodes.rationale: All storefront-core additions live in src/index.ts grouped by domain; no new sub-modules until file exceeds ~1500 lines.

nodes.label: process* Server-Side Helper Pattern
nodes.rationale: process* helpers combine fetchProximaWebsite plus API call for Astro API routes; pure client functions used from client:* components.

nodes.label: No Auto Token Refresh in SDK
nodes.rationale: refreshBuyerToken is explicit; Astro middleware owns 401 detection and cookie updates to keep SDK stateless.
nodes.norm_label: no auto token refresh in sdk

nodes.label: proxima.website.json
nodes.rationale: Client website deploy manifest with section_types and pages only; separate from marketplace proxima.template.json.

nodes.label: PROXIMA_SERVICE_KEY
nodes.rationale: Bearer token for website deploy; same credential storefront already uses; identifies business for deploy scope.

nodes.label: PROXIMA_API_TOKEN
nodes.rationale: Admin token for template marketplace register/publish flow targeting /api/v1/admin/cms/website-templates.

nodes.label: Scaffold Sections One-Time Only
nodes.rationale: Initial page structure only; if merchant already added sections via Builder, deploy skips scaffold to never overwrite content.

nodes.label: Breaking Change 409 Protection
nodes.rationale: Attribute type or name changes return 409 unless ?force=true so developers consciously accept schema drift.

nodes.label: PageRouter thin route pattern
nodes.source_location: Paso a) Crear la ruta Astro

nodes.label: section three-place sync
nodes.source_location: Una sección vive en tres lugares

nodes.label: CMS CODE SCHEMA SDK SCAFFOLD labels
nodes.norm_label: cms code schema sdk scaffold labels

nodes.label: Zod manifest validation
nodes.rationale: Schema enforces cross-references between scaffold_sections and section_types, smart_collection_id placeholders instead of numeric IDs in templates, content_page path requirements, and rejection of sensitive attribute keys.

nodes.label: Credentials resolution priority
nodes.rationale: CLI flags override process.env, which overrides credentials JSON, which overrides .env — highest-precedence source wins for each setting.
